data.value: Failed to construct grid spatial data : {0}

data.value: Netcdf variable {0} of type {1} has been ignored.

data.value: Cannot create spatial data {0} on volume location. This is currenty not supported.

data.name: FMMapFileFunctionStore_CreateCoverage_NetlinkDimensionCurrentyNotSupported
data.value: {0} depends on Netlink dimension. This is currenty not supported.

data.name: FMMapFileFunctionStore_CreateCoverage_UnexpectedLocationDimension
data.value: Unexpected location (dimension) '{0}'

data.name: FMMapFileFunctionStore_CoordinateSystem_Could_not_set_coordinate_system_in_output_map_because_grid_is_not_set
data.value: Could not set coordinate system in output map because grid is not set.

data.name: ExportGrid_Cannot_export_in_this_format_if_the_grid_is_not_correct
data.value: Cannot export in this format if the grid is not correct.

data.name: FMMapFileFunctionStore_ConstructFunctions_Time_dependent_variable___0___has_been_filtered_out
data.value: Will not import three dimensional time dependent variable ({0}), because the map file version does not support it.

data.name: WaterFlowFMModelDefinition_SetMapFormatPropertyValue_MapFormat_property_value_of_FlowFM_model__0__is_changed_to_1__because_it_is_part_of_an_1D2D_integrated_model_
data.value: MapFormat property value of FlowFM model {0} is changed to 1, because it is part of an 1D2D integrated model.

data.name: WaterFlowFMModelDefinition_SetMapFormatPropertyValue_MapFormat_property_value_of_FlowFM_model__0__is_changed_to_4_due_to_activation_of_Morphology_
data.value: MapFormat property value of FlowFM model {0} is changed to 4 due to activation of Morphology.

data.name: WaterFlowFMModel_SetVar_FM_Model__0__is_part_of_a_1D2D_model_and_can_t_have_morphology_properties_and___or_sediments__Removing_these_properties_from_the_model
data.value: FM Model {0} is part of a 1D2D model and can't have morphology properties and / or sediments. Removing these properties from the model

data.name: SedimentFile_WriteSpatiallyVaryingSedimentPropertySubFiles_Cannot_create_xyz_file_for_spatial_varying_initial_condition__0__because_it_is_a_value_spatial_operation__please_interpolate_the_operation_to_the_grid_or
data.value: Cannot create xyz file for spatial varying initial condition {0} because it is a value spatial operation. Please interpolate the operation to the grid or click the "Copy to spatial data"-button to generate the xyz file.

data.name: ExtForceFile_ReadSpatialData_The_model_may_not_run__Spatial_varying_quantity__0__could_not_be_imported_because_the_prefix_does_not_match__1__for_Tracers_or__2__for_Spatial_Varying_Sediments_
data.value: The model may not run. Spatial varying quantity {0} could not be imported because the prefix does not match {1} for Tracers or {2} for Spatial Varying Sediments.

data.name: SedimentFile_WriteXYZIfDirectoryExists_Could_not_get_directory_name_from_file_path__0_
data.value: Could not get directory name from file path {0}

data.name: WaterFlowFMModelDefinition_SelectSpatialOperations_Duplication_of_spatial_operations_for__0___Please_verify_the_model_after_saving_
data.value: Duplication of spatial operations for {0}. Please verify the model after saving.

data.name: MduFile_ReadMorphologyProperties_Cannot_read_ibedcond_because_this_is_not_an_integer__number__in_file__0_
data.value: Cannot read ibedcond because this is not an integer (number) in file {0}

data.value: Morphology boundary condition bcm-file importer could not import data onto given target.

data.name: WaterFlowFMBoundaryConditionValidator_ValidateMorphologyBoundaryHaveHydroBoundaries_Morphology_boundary_condition_must_have_a_Hydro_boundary_condition_
data.value: Morphology boundary condition must have a Hydro boundary condition!

data.name: WaterFlowFMBoundaryConditionValidator_ValidateSedimentConcentrationBoundaryHaveHydroBoundaries_Sediment_concentration_boundary_condition_must_have_a_Hydro_boundary_condition_
data.value: Sediment concentration boundary condition must have a Hydro boundary condition!

data.name: SedimentFile_WriteSpatiallyVaryingSedimentPropertySubFiles_No_spatial_operations_of_type_Import__Add_or_Value_found_for_spatially_varying_property__0___Remember_to_interpolate_them_to_generate_the_xyz_file__Otherwise_the_model_might_not_run_as_expected_
data.value: No spatial operations of type Import, Add or Value found for spatially varying property {0}. Remember to interpolate them to generate the xyz file. Otherwise the model might not run as expected.

data.name: WaterFlowFMModelDefinitionValidator_Validate_
data.value: Conveyance2D type in Geometry should be set to 'R=HU' (-1), 'R=H' (0) or 'R=A/P' (1) when morphology is active.

data.name: WaterFlowFMBoundaryConditionValidator_ValidateFlowBoundaryConditions_A_morphology_boundary_condition_cannot_have_more_than_one_point_with_generated_data_
data.value: A morphology boundary condition cannot have more than one point with generated data.

data.name: WaterFlowFMBoundaryConditionValidator_ValidateBoundaryConditionPointIndex_Time_series_contains_forbidden_negative_values_for__0__at_point__1_
data.value: Time series contains forbidden negative values for {0} at point {1}

data.name: WaterFlowFMBoundaryConditionValidator_ValidateSupportPointNames_Custom_support_point_names_are_not_supported_by_gui
data.value: Support point number {0} has a name of '{1}', but '{2}' was expected. Custom names are not yet supported in the GUI.

data.value: Converting time dependent spatial data to samples is not supported

data.value: Converting a non-double valued coverage component to a point cloud is not supported

data.name: UnstructuredGridCoverageExtensions_ToPointCloud_Spatial_data_is_not_consistent__number_of_coordinate_does_not_match_number_of_values
data.value: Spatial data is not consistent: number of coordinate does not match number of values

data.value: It was not possible to load from file: {0}. LogFilePath: {1}

data.name: WaterFlowFMSedimentMorphologyValidator_ValidateMorphologyBetaWarning_Morphology___Sediment_Beta_warning
data.value: Morphology / Sediment Beta warning

data.name: WaterFlowFMSedimentMorphologyValidator_ValidateSedimentName_Value_cannot_be_coverted_to_valid_sediment_fraction_name__You_can_only_use_characters__numbers__underscore_____and_hyphen_____and_it_cannot_start_only_with_a______it_NEEDS_a_closing_____
data.value: Value cannot be coverted to valid sediment fraction name. You can only use characters, numbers, underscore (_) and hyphen (-) and it cannot start only with a '#', it NEEDS a closing '#'

data.name: WaterFlowFMSedimentMorphologyValidator_ValidateMorphologyBetaWarning_________Morphology_is_beta_version_________0_You_are_using_morphology___sediment_in_this_model__Please_be_aware_this_feature_is_in_beta_
data.value: ********Morphology is beta version********{0}You are using morphology / sediment in this model. Please be aware this feature is in beta!

data.name: WaterFlowFMModelComputationalGridValidator_Validate_No_computational_grid_defined_
data.value: No computational grid defined. Either a Flow1D or a 2D grid needs to be created.

data.name: WaterFlowFMModelComputationalGridValidator_Validate_No_computational_grid_cells_defined_for_branch__0___can_not_start_calculation_
data.value: No computational grid cells defined for branch {0}; can not start calculation.

data.value: Original discretization is invalid: structure {0} is on a grid point

data.value: No CrossSection defined, all channels will be using the default values.

data.value: Grid is empty

data.value: More than two branches with the same ordernumber '{0}' are connected to node {1}; can not start calculation.

data.value: Target and source node of branch '{0}' have the same id, '{1}'. Circular branch?

data.value: Branch '{0}' has an order number of '{1}'. Ordernumber can be -1 (no interpolation over node) or greater than or equal to 0

data.value: No grid points defined between structure {0} and {1}

data.value: Not enough grid points defined for branch {0}. Make sure you have at least gridpoints at start and end of branch.

data.value: Only one enclosure per FM model is allowed. Enclosures found in model: {0}

data.value: The drawn polygon {0} is not valid to create an enclosure. Verify it is not self-intersected.

data.value: Multiple enclosures added to the model. Validate or run will fail if more than one enclosure is present.

data.value: Geometry not valid for {0}. It must be a closed polygon.

data.value: DryPoints parameter contains more than one file format. Only one format (Area or Points) is allowed. {0}

data.value: An unrecognized keyword *{0}* has been detected. The setting will be preserved and written back to the MDU file on export.
